title: My entire filming setup for Ads & YouTube videos (with links)
description:
Google Doc with all links: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1u...

Start an AI Marketing Agency and have AI do the client fulfillment work: https://go.clientascension.ai/?el=You...

1-on-1 Calls with me: https://danielfazio.io

All my links: https://linktr.ee/danielfazio

__________________________________________

Camera & Recording

Camera: Sony ZV-E10 (base only, no kit lens) - https://amzn.to/4aLXacu
Change overheat settings via tutorial or it cuts off at 30-40 min.

Lens: Sigma 16mm - https://amzn.to/46QSLmb
16mm lets camera sit closer. 30mm looks better but requires too much distance.

Continuous Battery: Sony ACPW20 - https://amzn.to/4ahli6P
Plugs camera into wall so you never swap batteries.

Recording Converter: Elgato Cam Link 4K - https://amzn.to/4rzVN6Z
HDMI in, USB-A out. Required for proper quality recording.

Camera Cable: Micro HDMI to HDMI 4K 60fps - https://amzn.to/4reTqWG
Small end into camera, big end into Cam Link, Cam Link into computer.

Teleprompter: Elgato Prompter - https://amzn.to/4aqvBnO
USB-C to USB-A out. Need USB-A port or hub.

Mic: Shure MV7+ - https://amzn.to/3Mcnjbc
USB-C to USB-C. Upgrade over older MV7.

Mic Stand: Rode PSA1 - https://amzn.to/4kIriZS
Clamps to desk edge, bends and extends to position.

Tripod: Amazon Basics 60" - https://amzn.to/4kIriZS
Camera screws directly on. Easy latch height adjustment. Best tripod, cheap, sturdy.

Lighting
Key rule: brighter in front of you than behind you. Needs to be way brighter than you think.

Tier 1 (Minimum - indoor room, no windows behind you):
Round Light: Neewer - https://amzn.to/4cyy4z0
Main front light. Good starting point.

Light Stand: https://amzn.to/4cyy4z0

Key Lights: ALTSON LED Kit (2 pack w/ stands) - https://amzn.to/4kzKo4d
One shines on top of head, one on the darker side of your face.

Tier 2 (If Tier 1 isn't enough):

Aputure 200d - https://amzn.to/4qwgBKX
Bright LED, must use with lightbox. Works on Neewer stand or Aputure stand: https://amzn.to/3ZxwXZ1
Amaran Lightbox - https://amzn.to/3ZxwXZ1
Required to diffuse light. Brightness adjustable.

Tier 3 (Very bright background like floor-to-ceiling windows):

Aputure 600d - https://amzn.to/4avyJim
Extremely bright. Near 100% during daytime. Uses same Amaran Lightbox.

Heavy Duty Stand for 600d - https://amzn.to/4avyJim

Misc

USB Hub - https://amzn.to/4rojrmQ
Most gear plugs in here. May need to use computer ports too for overflow.

Monitor: Dell 27" - https://amzn.to/4aO8mFv

Standing Desk - https://amzn.to/4aeUF2i

Treadmill Walking Pad - https://amzn.to/4bNyqlc
15-20K steps/day. One of the best purchases ever.

MacBook Pro - https://amzn.to/4rQTPyF / https://amzn.to/466nSKk

title: How to sell higher ticket packages
description:
CLIENT ASCENSION: Join this if you want help building a front-end cold traffic offer and reaching $10k-$30k/mo with cold outreach: https://ClientAscension.com

OLYMPIA: Join this if you want help scaling to $100k - $500k/mo with ads: https://JoinOlympia.com

This video will show you how to sign higher priced clients and sell higher ticket packages. This is done through using ROI calculators, client case studies, actually making a sales argument to sell the opportunity, and stacking the amount of deliverables that are included in your offer.

Why is this important to do? Because in order to convince somebody to pay you money, the only thing they're concerned with is making a return on their investment. Therefore, all of the information we present within the sales process needs to lead them to believing that they WILL IN FACT receive a return on investment. What dictates them coming to believe this?

1. Being quoted higher results that are substantial enough to warrant attention from people who can afford to spend a lot of money
2. Them understanding the math behind the situation
3. Them understanding what exactly it is you're building for them
4. Them understanding what deliverables/specific actions are required to generate the results in the first place
5. Them understanding that your offer encompasses all of the things required to get results
6. Proof/evidence that either the opportunity works or that you personally have delivered the result for other people, using the same opportunity

Follow me on Twitter: https://x.com/thedanielfazio
Follow me on Instagram: @ daniel.jf1

title: Case Study: How Ravi Hit $66k/mo in 4 Months inside Client Ascension
description:
Start & scale your own AI Assisted Agency in the next 30 days: https://go.clientascension.ai?el=Case...

Follow Ravi on Twitter: https://x.com/ravikabir_
Follow Ravi on YouTube:    / @ravi_regnatus  
CORRECTION: Ravi actually completed the month at $71k cash collected

AI does 90% of the work at 80% gross profit margins. No more needing to spend hundreds of hours to "learn a skill" - just copy & paste pre-built offers and have AI do the work for you while being able to get results for clients without any previous experience or case studies.

I'll give you:
1. Exactly what to sell
2. Who to sell it to
3. How much to charge for it
4. How to fulfill it
5. All the pre-trained AI tools
6. Pre-made client contracts, websites, marketing & sales assets
7. And so much more...

Get started with an AI Assisted Agency now: https://go.clientascension.ai?el=Case...

Ravi started out with an SEO agency for SaaS companies. When I first spoke to him after joining, I let him know that this was not a front-end cold traffic offer - meaning that it would be too difficult to get sales calls booked for this offer on the front end. He needed to come up with a new offer that had front-end cold traffic demand and could book calls on the front end. We accomplished this by converting his business to an Ads/Funnels agency where he builds funnels for clients and advertising for them. This is way more attractive on the front end. Ultimately, from the substantial increase in calls booked and clients signed, he actually ends up signing more SEO clients as cross-sells than he would've only promoting SEO.

This strategy works because there is only so much front-end cold traffic demand activity in the market at any given time. You cannot sell anything you want. You can only sell what is actively in demand, and once you've got a prospect to even get on the phone in the first place, is when you're able to sell them other stuff.

When I say that you need to develop a front-end cold traffic offer, you probably say something like "well then i have to learn a whole new things to sell and I'm not prepared to do that." I have two responses to this:

1. Too bad.
2. You can just use AI to do all of the work for you, because the work AI produces is better than 19/20 humans anyway.

For instance, if you don't know how to write copy, or ads, or funnels, I just have pre-trained AI tools for you to use to do this. You don't need to spend hundreds of hours becoming an expert. You just copy exactly what i have.

This is the future of agencies. You must use AI Assistance. You must start an AI Assisted Agency.

Start yours and get it off the ground in the next 30 days: https://go.clientascension.ai?el=Case...

Quick Video Synopsis:
I'm going to teach you the right way to make money with AI in this video.

This video is for normal people. Not tech experts or developers or highly technical people.

You don't need any experience.

The best way to make money with AI is not by making AI tools or apps. It's by taking in-demand services that businesses already buy, fulfilling those services with AI & Automation, and then selling those services to them as an agency.

You're thinking three things right now:
1. I don't even know what services I would offer because I don't have any experience.
2. I don't believe you. You can't sell services for $5,000/mo without being an expert.
3. I don't think it's possible to do this within a couple months.

So I do three things in this video:
1. Show you what services you would actually sell, and how to fulfill those clients using AI, so you can work less than 30 hours per week doing it.
